Introduction
    A Docent, A Little Lady and a Bouncer Named Dalton is an episode of Young Sheldon starring Iain Armitage, Zoe Perry, and Lance Barber. Sheldon gets a summer job at the local train museum; Missy embarks on a new stage of womanhood;...
